title: West Asia peace: A deal on Iran won't be enough to revive capital flows into India or fill the country's AI gaps
description: An Iran deal will bring short-term relief at best. What India needs is a radical injection of ideas to catch up in the artificial intelligence race and invigorate its economy. A rate hike by RBI, though a blunt tool, is needed to align Indian policy with tight global financial conditions
content:
Andy Mukherjee

title: Quote of the day by Jenson Huang: ‘Everyone is a programmer now. You just have to say something to the computer'
description: NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang believes Artificial Intelligence is transforming the way people interact with technology. His message is simple yet powerful: in the AI era, the ability to communicate ideas clearly may matter more than mastering complex programming languages.
content:

title: How to trade IT stocks after Nifty IT jumps 2%: Analyst sees further rally; Infosys, TCS, HCL Tech in focus
description: The rally in IT shares today comes amid renewed global enthusiasm around artificial intelligence-linked technology stocks. The technical setup has potentially opened the door for further gains in heavyweight IT stocks such as Infosys, TCS and HCL Technologies.

title: Morgan Stanley Warns Of Bank Job Cuts In Europe Due To AI Productivity Gains
description: Morgan Stanley has warned that artificial intelligence could lead to major job cuts in European banks over the next few years. The report said AI may improve productivity by up to 30 percent, reducing the need for large workforces in banking operations
content:
Investment bank Morgan Stanley has said that artificial intelligence could lead to large-scale job cuts across European banks in the coming years.
